Package com.marklogic.flux.api

Interface ReadTabularFilesOptions

All Superinterfaces:
ReadFilesOptions<ReadTabularFilesOptions>
public interface ReadTabularFilesOptions extends ReadFilesOptions<ReadTabularFilesOptions>
For objects that can import tabular files, where the data source supports additional options that do not have dedicated methods in the importer interface.

    Methods inherited from interface com.marklogic.flux.api.ReadFilesOptions

  • Method Details

    • additionalOptions

      ReadTabularFilesOptions additionalOptions(Map<String,String> options)

    • drop

      ReadTabularFilesOptions drop(String... columns)
      Filter columns from the input data. The specified columns will not be included in the constructed documents.

      Examples:

      • drop("salary")
      • drop("status")
      • drop("age", "city")

      Parameters:
      columns - the names of the columns to drop from the input data; these columns will not be included in the constructed documents
      Returns:
      this importer instance
      Since:
      2.1.0

    • groupBy

      @Deprecated ReadTabularFilesOptions groupBy(String columnName)
      Deprecated.
      since 2.1.0; use StructuredDataImporter.groupBy(String, java.util.function.Consumer) instead.

    • aggregateColumns

      @Deprecated ReadTabularFilesOptions aggregateColumns(String aggregationName, String... columns)
      Deprecated.
      since 2.1.0; use StructuredDataImporter.GroupByOptions.aggregateColumns(String, String...) instead.

    • orderAggregation

      @Deprecated ReadTabularFilesOptions orderAggregation(String aggregationName, String columnName, boolean ascending)
      Deprecated.
      since 2.1.0; use StructuredDataImporter.GroupByOptions.orderAggregation(String, String, boolean) instead.
      Since:
      2.0.0

    • uriIncludeFilePath

      ReadTabularFilesOptions uriIncludeFilePath(boolean value)
